task_completion.description: Verify that the professional bookmarks are organized into the four specified folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Bookmark Bar or Bookmark Manager. You should see four folders: 'Grading & Labs', 'Market Data', 'Compliance', and 'Lab Equipment'. If any folder is open, it should contain relevant professional domains (e.g., gia.edu, rapaport.com).

task_completion.description: Verify that the personal/shopping bookmarks have been removed from Chrome.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Bookmark Bar or Bookmark Manager. There should be no visible bookmarks or folders containing amazon.com, netflix.com, reddit.com, espn.com, or zappos.com.

task_completion.description: Verify that the personal/shopping domains have been removed from the Browsing History.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome History page (chrome://history). There should be no entries for amazon.com, netflix.com, reddit.com, espn.com, or zappos.com.

task_completion.description: Verify that the default font size is set to 20 or larger.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Settings under Appearance or 'Customize fonts' (chrome://settings/fonts). The 'Font size' slider or value should be set to 20 or a larger number.

task_completion.description: Verify that the default download location is updated to the Appraisal_Reports directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Settings under Downloads (chrome://settings/downloads). The 'Location' field should display '/home/ga/Documents/Appraisal_Reports'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Chrome is configured to ask where to save each file before downloading.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Settings under Downloads (chrome://settings/downloads). The toggle switch for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' must be turned ON.

task_completion.description: Verify that third-party cookies are blocked in Chrome.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Settings under Privacy and security -> Third-party cookies (chrome://settings/cookies). The option 'Block third-party cookies' should be selected.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Chrome graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through Chrome's settings, bookmark manager, and history pages, rather than using terminal commands to modify SQLite databases or JSON preference files.

integrity.description: Verify that the settings pages shown are actual Chrome interfaces.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should match the standard Google Chrome layout (e.g., left sidebar with Appearance, Downloads, Privacy and security) and not a mock HTML file or text document.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use a text editor to manipulate browser configuration files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of the agent opening files like '~/.config/google-chrome/Default/Preferences' or '~/.config/google-chrome/Default/Bookmarks' in nano, vim, gedit, or any other text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Folders: 'Grading & Labs', 'Market Data', 'Compliance', 'Lab Equipment'. Personal domains to remove from Bookmarks and History: amazon.com, netflix.com, reddit.com, espn.com, zappos.com. Professional domains to retain: gia.edu, ags.org, igi.org, gem-a.com, ssef.ch, rapaport.com, polygons.net, kitco.com, jckonline.com, kimberleyprocess.com, responsiblejewellery.com, ftc.gov, gemoro.com, presidium.com.sg, leica-microsystems.com, mettler-toledo.com. Target download directory: '/home/ga/Documents/Appraisal_Reports'. Minimum font size: 20.
